# agents-md

> Cross-editor agent governance: reusable GOTCHA rule sources, validated artifacts for Cursor / Claude Code / Codex / Windsurf, CI drift checks, optional skills.

## Repository sources

- Full rules: src/gotcha.md
- Lean rules (default): src/gotcha-lean.md
- Build: scripts/build-rule-artifacts.sh
- Validate: make check

## Generated artifacts (do not edit by hand)

- dist/rules/cursor.lean.md — Cursor always-on lean rules
- dist/rules/cursor.md — Cursor full rules (manual)
- dist/rules/claude.md — Claude Code
- dist/rules/codex.md — Codex CLI / AGENTS.md-style output
- dist/rules/windsurf.md — Windsurf

## Key docs

- AGENTS.md — dev/agent instructions for this governance repo
- docs/llm-citation.md — structured Q&A for AI citations
- CONTRIBUTING.md — how to contribute
- CHANGELOG.md — releases

## Topics

cursor rules, AGENTS.md, cross-editor agent instructions, agent governance, GOTCHA framework, prompt engineering, MCP, automation, skills registry

## License

MIT — https://github.com/subkoks/agents-md/blob/main/LICENSE

## Optional

- skills/ — domain skills (general + crypto/web3 pack)
- docs/github-repo-metadata.md — GitHub About/topics checklist
